title: Crunchy Portuguese Rice Crumble
description: A herbal and crunchy light portuguese dish featuring rice, whisked with herbs to create a delightful crumble that is nut-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: Vegetable Oil
ingredients.notes: For coating the rice and for making a crispy exterior

ingredients.name: Butter
ingredients.notes: To provide richness and creaminess to the crumble

ingredients.name: Milk or Heavy Cream
ingredients.notes: For a creamy base of the crumble

instructions: Rinse the rice under cold water until the running water is clear, then drain.
Combine the rice with vegetable oil in a large mixing bowl. Mix well until all grains are evenly coated.
Spread the coated rice on a baking sheet and bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 10-12 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
In another mixing bowl, combine butter with cream cheese, herbs, milk, and salt. Mix well to ensure all ingredients are evenly combined.
Pour the creamy mixture over the baked rice, then return it to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes until heated through and slightly golden.
Remove from the oven and let it cool before serving. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
